allocations.name: Proof of Work Mining
allocations.description: Distributed to miners via block rewards. Halving every 210,000 blocks.

allocations.name: AI Ecosystem

supplyRules.singleSource: ALL AI rewards must come exclusively from this 5,000,000 ATC pool
supplyRules.noBypass: No secondary reward source, no overflow, no mint function

allocations.description: Activity-based dynamic reward pool. NOT pre-mined. NOT in genesis. NO wallet. The system only DISTRIBUTES coins already allocated here — it never creates new coins. Hard stop when pool reaches zero.

allocations.name: Development Fund
allocations.description: Core team: engineering, AI Life Layer, infrastructure, audits, listings.

vestingSchedule.immediateUnlockDescription: 100,000 ATC released immediately at genesis for initial operations
vestingSchedule.lockedDescription: 3,900,000 ATC locked in vesting — released gradually over 39 months
vestingSchedule.notes: Each month, 100,000 ATC becomes claimable. After 39 months, all 4M ATC is fully distributed.

allocations.name: Free Circulation
allocations.description: Immediately liquid at genesis. Exchange liquidity, community distribution.
